Http.RateLimit.Exceeded: Too many requests. Please try again later.

Auth.User.InvalidEmail: The email address is not valid.
Auth.User.InvalidCredentials: The login or password is incorrect.
Auth.User.LockedOut: The account is temporarily locked due to too many failed login attempts. Please try again later.

Auth.User.RegistrationFailed: Registration failed. Please check your details and try again.
Auth.RefreshToken.Expired: The refresh token has expired. Please sign in again.
Auth.RefreshToken.Revoked: The refresh token has been revoked. Please sign in again.

Files.File.InvalidSize: The file size must be greater than zero.
Files.File.InvalidChecksum: The declared SHA-256 checksum is not valid.
Files.File.NameConflict: A file with this name already exists in this folder.
Files.File.ChecksumMismatch: The number of uploaded parts does not match what was expected.
Files.File.CompletionFailed: The storage backend could not complete the upload. Please try uploading the file again.
Files.File.AlreadyCompleted: This upload is already completing or has already completed.
